classification.battleIdleReference: single ARCADE robot with slot reels, joystick, cyan/purple ring and coins
classification.idleMove16: 4x4 16-frame stable idle/move loop with coin orbit and subtle robot motion
classification.optionalHit16: 4x4 numbered 16-frame stable body candidate for hit flicker/electric impact
classification.rageJackpot32: 8x4 32-frame rage/jackpot ramp, gold coins, RAGE and JACKPOT end states
classification.defeatReviveVictory16: 4x4 defeat, revive and victory sheet; use cropped segments only
classification.propVfxSheet: labeled concept sheet; crop only machine, hammer, rocket, bunny, shield, glitch, coin, jackpot and icons
classification.textMultiplierSheet: labeled UI/VFX sheet; crop only special words, multipliers, rings and tiles
